{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201143598C651EF727D935FD8692"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617689908870284057","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"开局太难了小命随时被拿捏那些那么强的后宫美女也不敢吃"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773634931,"group_id":"7590404286366878744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzlA0846UyXMlqI3M7fkiJ8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"65562099333342","user_name":"喜欢青麸杨的李楠香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"65562099333342","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590404286366878744","book_info":{"abstract":"【修罗场】+【魂穿游戏】+【无敌】+【搞笑】+【反差爽】+【妖女】
穿越前，赵错是游戏《乱世红颜》的狗策划。
为了给游戏主角铺路，为了引诱玩家疯狂648，他联手脑残编剧一切谱写了卡池中女魔头们的悲惨命运。
他设计让妖皇献祭己身，镇压万魔；
他安排让魔教教主家破人亡，堕入邪道；
他让九天玄女道心破碎，因爱生恨……
他看着她们一个个黑化成神，看着游戏热度蹭蹭暴涨，感到很满意。
直到……
他穿越成了这个游戏中随时会暴毙的傀儡皇帝！
为了留住狗命，他“机智”地顶替了主角的身份，深陷进一群疯批妖女们的包围之中。
看着她们那“夫君，你为何负我”的眼神，他慌了。
赵错：朕现在解释，你们找错人了，那个渣男是我弟，还来得及吗？
——不，想活命，唯一的办法就是让她们为了争夺朕这个“夫君”，先打起来！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o254be168ca907992a517ad04864f9848~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"冰镇钢蹦","author_id":"","book_id":"7590404286366878744","book_name":"什么，朕的后宫全是妖女","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d89858","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590404790526427672","read_count":"624","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"430808"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"162","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,无敌,穿越,东方玄幻,系统,网游,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o254be168ca907992a517ad04864f9848~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779162239&x-signature=ZJN2Dn%2BKQaHodzh712dMVxsnDbs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1214311059435229","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"", 穿越前，赵错是游戏《乱世红颜》的狗策划。
为了给游戏主角铺路，为了引诱玩家疯狂648，他联手脑残编剧一切谱写了卡池中女魔头们的悲惨命运。
